body: import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.nio.charset.UnsupportedCharsetException;
import org.apache.commons.codec.DecoderException;
import org.apache.commons.codec.EncoderException;
import org.junit.Test;
import org.apache.commons.codec.CharEncoding;
import static org.junit.Assert.*;

translation: plain = "This is a example of a quoted=printable text file. There is no tt"
expected = "This is a example of a quoted=3Dprintable text file. There is no tt"
assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, but got {result}"
plain = "This is a example of a quoted-printable text file. There is no end to it\t"
expected = "This is a example of a quoted-printable text file. There is no end to i=\r\nt=09"
plain = "This is a example of a quoted-printable text file. There is no end to it "
expected = "This is a example of a quoted-printable text file. There is no end to i=\r\nt=20"
plain = "This is a example of a quoted-printable text file. There is no end to   "
expected = "This is a example of a quoted-printable text file. There is no end to=20=\r\n =20"
plain = "This is a example of a quoted-printable text file. There is no end to=  "
expected = "This is a example of a quoted-printable text file. There is no end to=3D=\r\n =20"
plain = "This is a example of a quoted-printable text file. This might contain sp=cial chars."
expected = "This is a example of a quoted-printable text file. This might contain sp=3D=\r\n" + "cial chars."
plain = "This is a example of a quoted-printable text file. This might contain ta\tbs as well."
expected = "This is a example of a quoted-printable text file. This might contain ta=09=\r\n" + "bs as well."
qpdata = "CRLF in an\n encoded text should be=20=\r\n\rskipped in the\r decoding."
expected = "CRLF in an encoded text should be skipped in the decoding."
qpdata = "If you believe that truth=3Dbeauty, then surely mathematics is the most b=\r\n" + \
expected = "If you believe that truth=beauty, then surely mathematics is the most beautiful" + \
"If you believe that truth=3Dbeauty, then surely=20=\r\n"
+ "mathematics is the most beautiful branch of philosophy."
"If you believe that truth=beauty, then surely mathematics is the most beautiful"
assert result is None, "Encoding a null Object should return null"
assert False, "Trying to url encode a Double object should cause an exception."
assert result is None, "Result should be None"
assert result is None, "Result should be None"
assert result is None, "Result should be None"
assert "Basic quoted-printable decoding test" == plain, qpcodec.decode3(encoded.decode('utf-8'))
assert encoded is None, "Encoding a null string should return None"
assert qpcodec.encode1(None) is None, "Null string quoted-printable encoding test"
assert qpcodec.decode3(None) is None, "Null string quoted-printable decoding test"
assert encoded == "=3D=0D=0A", "Unsafe chars quoted-printable encoding test"
assert plain == qpcodec.decode3(encoded), "Unsafe chars quoted-printable decoding test"
assert encoded == "=3D Hello there =3D=0D=0A", "Basic quoted-printable encoding test"
assert plain == qpcodec.decode3(encoded), "Basic quoted-printable decoding test"
